howItWorks.intro: This palladium investment calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Current Value
rules.formula: Value = Troy Ounces x Spot Price
rules.explanation: Weight converted to troy ounces multiplied by the current spot price.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Palladium is rarer than gold and has strong industrial demand, especially for catalytic converters. It can diversify a precious metals portfolio beyond gold and silver.

faq.q: How does palladium compare to platinum?
faq.a: Palladium has outperformed platinum in recent years due to gasoline engine catalyst demand, while platinum is used more in diesel catalysts.
